title: helichrysum tricostatum
intro: Helichrysum tricostatum, also known as the yellow fever or African feather, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to southern Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum tricostatum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including essential oils, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
